jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Sahyadri Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sahyadri Hospitals. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Sahyadri Hospitals:
Sahyadri Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals!
